description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a hip roof featuring a brownish color and a light wood-textured exterior. The front facade includes a simple door, two windows, and a small garden area with white decorative elements. The house is surrounded on one side by a wooden fence enclosing a backyard, which contains a patio area with outdoor furniture and a tree. The backyard also has a section filled with what appears to be white and black debris or landscaping material. The rear and side views show additional windows and access to the backyard, as well as two green bins placed against the house. The overall design is modest and functional, with a focus on practicality and outdoor living space.
description: A two-story house with a hip roof, light wood-textured exterior, and a fenced backyard featuring a patio and garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main door, two windows, and a small garden with white decorations.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the wooden fence, backyard patio with furniture, tree, and green bins.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the fenced backyard, patio area, and a pile of white and black debris.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a single window, the side of the backyard, and part of the front garden.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple front door with a small set of steps, no porch, and minimal decorative elements.
